title: Company, Site Customization, and other changes

texts: Added the Company Page, accessible under the My Profile Category. Set the identities and E.G.Os you own. Other users will be able to see them on your profile page. You can also use them to filter out team builds with something you don't own.
Added the Site Customization Page, accessible under the My Profile Category. Change how certain parts of the site are displayed. Currently only has minimal options, but more will be added over time.
Added Encounters and Icons to tokens. Icons allows me to add various icons to the site. Currently supported icons include those of some Associations, Wings, Fingers, and Syndicates.
Encounters: Changed the buffs section for Reflectrials to show both ally and enemy buffs.
Added estimated clash and damage values with conditionals to skill cards. Only applies to identities and E.G.Os, not to enemies.
Added a Recent Additions section to the home page. Removed the text about the old sites.
Changed the identities/E.G.O menu to retain filters when swapping between modes.
Added a View My Profile link to the sidebar to more easily access your own profile.
Changed the styling of tokens with links to be more in line with the rest of the site.
Collapsed the general links in the sidebar to a single General category.
Reduced the spacing between items in the sidebar.
Moved the Gift Tag Strips toggle in the Gifts page to Site Customization.
Fixed an issue with handling pagination of search results.
Fixed an issue that caused the overlays when using Display Type in builds to extend past the intended size if the build uses sinner notes.
Fixed an issue that caused filtering by affinities or skill types in the id/ego menu to crash.
Fixed an issue that caused theme pack menus in the floor planner to get cut off by the header.
Added an icon and more links to the supporters page.
Added the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service pages to the sidebar.
